_meta.notes: The Drowncaller — a halfling shipping inspector from the Coral Anchorage. Comes up to Knot's Landing in person when a previous batch of rigging has rusted at sea. Their stamp on the manifest is the difference between a barge that ships and a barge that doesn't. They are not unkind, but they are not lenient. Non-recurring; bound to the-joining beat-pack.

tagline: halfling, salt-cured, holding the manifest like a verdict.
